grievances.title: asfdsdf
grievances.description: sfdsdfsdfsfsdfsdfsfsfsfsfsfsfsdfsd

grievances.title: Piped water scheme laid but never connected
grievances.description: Jal Jeevan Mission pipeline was laid 2 years ago. Valves installed. But connections never given to houses. Water never came through the pipe.

grievances.title: Child marriage happening openly in village
grievances.description: Child marriage happens openly in our village. I know of 2 cases this year. Local police and gram panchayat turn a blind eye.

grievances.title: Late night factory noise causing health issues
grievances.description: Factory near our residential area runs machinery and generators at night. Noise levels are 80+ decibels. Residents have headaches and sleep issues.
grievances.adminNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the concerned department.

grievances.title: Crop insurance claim rejected unfairly
grievances.description: Crop insurance claim was filed for pest-damaged paddy. The surveyor came but the final claim was rejected citing wrong land survey number.

grievances.title: Local government office very corrupt
grievances.description: The taluk office is highly corrupt. Mid-level officers demand money for every service. Even for signature on applications, ₹100-500 demanded.

grievances.title: Solar panels at school not working
grievances.description: Solar panels installed at the government school 2 years ago are not working. No maintenance has been done. Wires hanging loose dangerously.

grievances.title: Road construction funds embezzled
grievances.description: Road construction contractor diverted funds. Work done only 20% but 80% payment released. All villagers know this. Please investigate.

grievances.title: Hospital X-ray machine non-functional
grievances.description: The X-ray machine at District Government Hospital has been non-functional for 4 months. Patients are being referred to private labs at high cost.
grievances.adminNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the concerned department.

grievances.title: Voter ID correction pending since 2 years
grievances.description: My voter ID has wrong date of birth since 2 years. I have submitted Form 8 twice at the booth level officer. Still not corrected.

grievances.title: SHG loan not sanctioned despite approval
grievances.description: Our women SHG was sanctioned a loan of ₹2 lakh by the District Cooperative Bank 8 months ago. Bank is delaying disbursement on some pretext.

grievances.title: Water tank not cleaned for 6 months
grievances.description: The overhead water tank serving our locality has not been cleaned for 6 months. Water is visibly dirty and smells. This is a health hazard.

grievances.title: Subsidized seeds not available this season
grievances.description: Subsidy seeds under PM Kisan scheme not available at the cooperative society this rabi season. Farmers forced to buy from private shops at double price.

grievances.title: Old age pensioner denied pension update
grievances.description: My father (78 years) is a registered beneficiary of Old Age Pension but his amount has not been updated since 2019 despite 2 applications.
grievances.adminNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the concerned department.

grievances.title: Child labour reported at brick kiln factory
grievances.description: Child labour is openly happening at the brick kiln outside the village. I have reported to the police twice but they have done nothing.

grievances.title: Animal shelter closed, stray dogs causing harm
grievances.description: Stray dog menace has increased after the shelter closed. 12 people bitten in the last 2 months. One child needed 14 injections.

grievances.title: Public library building in dilapidated state
grievances.description: The district public library building is in dangerous condition. Roof is leaking, walls have cracks. Students are afraid to enter but have no other option.

grievances.title: Flood relief funds not reached victims
grievances.description: Flood relief compensation of ₹6,000 per household announced by state govt has not reached any of the 300 flood-affected families in our village.

grievances.title: Harassment by revenue officer for bribery
grievances.description: The revenue officer at the tehsil office is asking ₹3000 bribe for mutation entries. I recorded the conversation. Please take action against him.
grievances.adminNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the concerned department.

grievances.title: No social security for construction workers
grievances.description: Construction labourers at our site have no BOCW registration, no PF, no accident insurance. The contractor is exploiting them under contract.

grievances.title: Local dam not maintained, flood risk high
grievances.description: The local dam embankment has 3 large cracks. Engineers visited last year and filed reports but no repair work started. Monsoon is approaching.

grievances.title: PM Kisan benefit not received since 2025
grievances.description: PM Kisan benefit has not been received since April 2025 installment. Other farmers in the same village received but mine is stuck.

grievances.title: Electricity bill error showing 10x amount
grievances.description: My electricity bill shows ₹45,000 for a house where only 3 bulbs and one fan run. BESCOM helpline keeps disconnecting. Please look into this.

grievances.title: Students not receiving mid-day meals
grievances.description: Mid-day meal has not been served in Government Primary School for 3 weeks. Children are going hungry. We suspect corruption in supply chain.
grievances.adminNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the concerned department.

grievances.title: Ambulance service not functional in district
grievances.description: The district ambulance service phone goes unanswered. We lost a neighbour because no ambulance came for 2 hours. This must be fixed urgently.

grievances.title: Public park occupied by encroachment
grievances.description: The public park in Sector 4 has been taken over by a builder for construction. No notice was given. This was the only green space for our children.

grievances.title: Aadhar linking issues blocking scholarship
grievances.description: My son's scholarship payment is blocked because Aadhaar linking to the scholarship portal is failing. He may drop out if fees are not paid.

grievances.title: Corruption in NREGA job card issuance
grievances.description: The local NREGA supervisor is forcing people to pay ₹200 bribe to get job cards issued. Poor villagers have no choice but to pay.

grievances.title: Groundwater contaminated with arsenic
grievances.description: Well water in our basti has turned yellow and smells bad. 3 children have skin rashes. We suspect industrial effluent contamination.
grievances.adminNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the concerned department.

grievances.title: Bridge on village road collapsed
grievances.description: The cement bridge over the seasonal river collapsed during monsoon. 4 villages are now cut off. Farmers cannot bring produce to market.

grievances.title: Anganwadi closed, malnourishment rising
grievances.description: The Anganwadi centre in Nandnagar has been closed for 3 months. 23 children aged 0-6 are not getting nutrition supplements. Malnutrition is rising.

grievances.title: Street lights not working in entire ward
grievances.description: All 48 street lights in Ward 12 have not been working for 2 months. Crime has increased. Women feel very unsafe to go out after dark.

grievances.title: PMAY house construction stopped midway
grievances.description: Housing construction under PM Awas Yojana stopped after 2nd installment. Contractor disappeared. Gram Panchayat ignoring our complaints.

grievances.title: Fertilizer not available at fair price shop
grievances.description: DAP fertilizer is not available at any fair price shop in our mandal since October. Farmers are being forced to buy at black market price of ₹1800/bag.
grievances.adminNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the concerned department.

grievances.title: Teacher assaulted student, no action taken
grievances.description: The teacher at Govt Middle School hit my son badly and when we complained to the headmaster, he did nothing. The teacher continues to teach.

grievances.title: Hospital charging extra for operations
grievances.description: Government hospital was charging ₹8000 for a delivery that should be free under Janani Suraksha Yojana. My wife had to pay. Please recover the money.

grievances.title: Ration card denied despite being BPL
grievances.description: Despite being a BPL family with annual income under ₹80,000, our ration card application has been rejected twice without valid reason given.

grievances.title: MGNREGS payments pending for 3 months
grievances.description: Wages under MGNREGS work done in June are still pending as of February. 120 workers have not been paid for 3 months of work. This is exploitation.

grievances.title: Widow pension stopped without notice
grievances.description: My mother who is a widow was receiving ₹1000/month widow pension. It stopped coming from October without any intimation. Her ID and bank details are same.
grievances.adminNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the concerned department.

grievances.title: Borewell pump not working since 15 days
grievances.description: The borewell pump serving 5 villages has broken down 15 days ago. We are fetching water from 2km away. Please repair or replace the pump motor.

grievances.title: Sewage water mixing in drinking water supply
grievances.description: The sewage pipe is leaking directly into our drinking water supply pipe. Many families have diarrhea and typhoid. This is a health emergency.

grievances.title: No toilets in school, girls dropouts increasing
grievances.description: The girls school in our panchayat has no toilet facility. Due to this, many parents are withdrawing their daughters. 34 girls dropped out this year.

grievances.title: Power outage daily for 8+ hours
grievances.description: There is power outage for 8-10 hours daily in our ward. Inverters are costly. Food is getting spoiled. Please fix the transformer.

grievances.title: Bus service stopped in our village
grievances.description: The only bus route connecting our village (Rampur hamlet) to the district has been stopped for 40 days. Old people and students are badly affected.
grievances.adminNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the concerned department.

grievances.title: House allotted under PMAY but no key given
grievances.description: We were allotted house under PM Awas Yojana Rural scheme in 2024. Construction completed but we have not received the key. Officer is demanding bribe.

grievances.title: Bank not releasing PM Kisan installment
grievances.description: My PM Kisan installment of Rs 2000 has not come since March 2025. The bank says Aadhaar seeding is done. Please investigate.

grievances.title: Crop damaged due to flood, need compensation
grievances.description: My kharif crop was completely destroyed by floods. I have submitted all documents but no compensation has come in 4 months. I have loan to repay.

grievances.title: School has no teachers since 2 months
grievances.description: The government school in our village has only 1 teacher for 6 classes. Children are sitting idle. Parents are withdrawing children.

grievances.title: Primary health centre has no doctor
grievances.description: Our primary health centre does not have a doctor for 2 months. Patients have to travel 40km for basic treatment. People are dying due to negligence.
grievances.adminNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the concerned department.

grievances.title: Road full of potholes causing accidents
grievances.description: The main road connecting our colony to the highway has dangerous potholes. Two accidents have already happened. Please repair immediately.

grievances.title: No water supply for 3 days in our area
grievances.description: We have been without water supply for the past 3 days. The municipal tanker is not coming. Children and elderly are suffering. This is unacceptable in 2026.

schemes.name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
schemes.description: Direct income support of ₹6,000/year to small and marginal farmers. Amount transferred in 3 equal installments of ₹2,000 directly to bank accounts.
schemes.benefits: ₹6,000 per year direct bank transfer in 3 installments

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
schemes.description: Health coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization across 25,000+ empanelled hospitals.
schemes.benefits: ₹5 lakh health insurance coverage per family per year

schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana (Urban)
schemes.description: Housing subsidy for urban poor under EWS/LIG/MIG categories. Interest subsidy on home loans up to ₹2.67 lakh per beneficiary.
schemes.benefits: Interest subsidy of 3-6.5% on home loans up to ₹20 lakh

schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana (Rural)
schemes.description: Financial assistance to rural households for construction of pucca houses. ₹1.20 lakh in plains and ₹1.30 lakh in hilly/NE states.
schemes.benefits: ₹1.20 – ₹1.30 lakh for house construction + MGNREGS convergence

schemes.name: Skill India Mission (PMKVY)
schemes.description: Free skill training and NSQF-aligned certification for youth aged 15-45 under Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana.
schemes.benefits: Free skill training + Rs. 8000 monetary reward on certification + placement support

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
schemes.description: Zero-balance savings account with RuPay debit card, ₹1 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life insurance, and overdraft facility.
schemes.benefits: Zero balance account + ₹1 lakh accident insurance + ₹30,000 life cover + OD facility

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.description: Multi-sector program to address declining child sex ratio and promote education of girl child. Includes Sukanya Samriddhi account.
schemes.benefits: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana: 8.2% interest on savings + tax exemption

schemes.name: PM Mudra Yojana
schemes.description: Collateral-free micro loans for non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises. Three tiers: Shishu (₹50K), Kishore (₹5L), Tarun (₹10L).
schemes.benefits: Loans from ₹50,000 to ₹10 lakh at low interest rates without collateral

schemes.name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
schemes.description: Free LPG connections to BPL households to provide clean cooking fuel. Over 9 crore connections distributed across India.
schemes.benefits: Free LPG connection + first refill cylinder + hotplate

schemes.name: MGNREGS (Mahatma Gandhi NREGA)
schemes.description: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per year to rural households. Wage rates vary by state (₹204–₹357 per day).
schemes.benefits: 100 days guaranteed employment per year + unemployment allowance if work not provided

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.description: Small savings scheme for girls below 10 years. 8.2% interest rate, tax-free returns, and maturity at girl's age 21.
schemes.benefits: 8.2% interest rate + tax exemption under 80C + tax-free maturity amount

schemes.name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Crop insurance scheme with premium as low as 1.5% for Rabi crops, 2% for Kharif crops. Coverage for losses due to natural calamities.
schemes.benefits: Crop insurance at 1.5-2% premium + web-based claim settlement

schemes.name: PM Vaya Vandana Yojana
schemes.description: Pension scheme for senior citizens above 60 offering guaranteed 7.4% return for 10 years. Managed by LIC of India.
schemes.benefits: 7.4% guaranteed pension for 10 years + loan facility + return of purchase price on death

schemes.name: Digital India Initiative
schemes.description: Digital skills training + broadband in villages + e-Governance services. Common Service Centres (CSC) in every panchayat.
schemes.benefits: Free internet access + digital literacy training + e-services at CSC

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
schemes.description: Guaranteed pension of ₹1,000–₹5,000/month after age 60 for unorganized sector workers. Government co-contributes 50% of premium.
schemes.benefits: Guaranteed pension ₹1K-₹5K/month after 60 + govt co-contribution + family pension

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card
schemes.description: Revolving credit for farmers to meet short-term credit requirements for crop cultivation, post-harvest expenses, and allied activities.
schemes.benefits: Credit limit based on land holding + 7% interest rate (4% after subsidy) + no collateral up to ₹1.6L

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Scholarship Scheme
schemes.description: Scholarship for wards of ex-servicemen and ex-coast guard personnel for professional degree courses at ₹2,500–₹3,000/month.
schemes.benefits: Monthly scholarship ₹2,500 (girls) / ₹3,000 (boys) for duration of professional courses

schemes.name: Tamil Nadu CM Insurance Scheme
schemes.description: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance for families with annual income under ₹1.2 lakh. ₹5 lakh coverage at empanelled hospitals.
schemes.benefits: ₹5 lakh health insurance at 1,000+ empanelled hospitals in TN

schemes.name: Kerala Smart Ration
schemes.description: Smart digitized Public Distribution System in Kerala with Aadhaar seeding, biometric authentication, and home delivery for elderly.
schemes.benefits: Subsidized rice ₹2/kg, wheat, sugar + home delivery for elderly/disabled

schemes.name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendors)
schemes.description: Collateral-free working capital loans of ₹10,000–₹50,000 for street vendors affected by COVID-19, with digital transaction rewards.
schemes.benefits: Loans ₹10K→₹20K→₹50K + ₹1,200/year cashback on digital payments + credit score building

preSevaAlerts.title: Predicted Flood Grievance Spike
preSevaAlerts.historicalPattern: Pattern detected in 2024 and 2025 during similar pre-monsoon showers.
preSevaAlerts.suggestedAction: Clear drainages in Ward 4, 7, and 12 immediately.
preSevaAlerts.description: AI model predicts 85%+ probability of flood-related grievance surge in next 14 days based on IMD data and historical patterns.

preSevaAlerts.title: Drought Pattern Detected
preSevaAlerts.historicalPattern: 300% grievance increase in this corridor during similar weather conditions.
preSevaAlerts.suggestedAction: Release canal water for agricultural use and notify farmers.
preSevaAlerts.description: Unusual drought pattern detected. Historical data shows 300% grievance increase in this corridor during similar weather conditions.

preSevaAlerts.title: Potential Dengue Outbreak
preSevaAlerts.historicalPattern: Vector disease pattern detected from health complaints.
preSevaAlerts.suggestedAction: Start intensive fogging and cleaning of stagnant water.
preSevaAlerts.description: Vector disease pattern detected from health complaints. Dengue or malaria outbreak probability high in next 7-10 days.

preSevaAlerts.title: Road Surface Deterioration
preSevaAlerts.historicalPattern: Multiple bridge and road complaints in same corridor.
preSevaAlerts.suggestedAction: Emergency road patching in the industrial zone.
preSevaAlerts.description: Multiple bridge and road complaints in same corridor. Systemic infrastructure failure predicted without intervention.

notifications.title: Critical Service Failure Alert

notifications.title: SLA Milestone Met
notifications.message: Officer Anita Singh resolved 100% of critical grievances in UP this week.

notifications.title: Escalation to High Command

notifications.title: Fraud Pattern Detected

communityPosts.title: Online petition: Fix water supply in Lucknow East before summer
communityPosts.content: Summer is coming and water supply is already unreliable. Sign this petition to demand daily 6-hour supply.

communityPosts.title: How I got my PM Kisan payment issue resolved in 3 days
communityPosts.content: Sharing my experience so others can benefit. File your complaint with the block-level agricultural officer directly, not the call centre.

sevaNews.title: PM Kisan Enhanced: ₹8,000/year from April 2026
sevaNews.body: The government has announced an increase in PM Kisan Samman Nidhi from ₹6,000 to ₹8,000 per year, effective April 2026. All registered farmers will automatically receive the enhanced amount.

sevaNews.title: 500 New Mobile Health Clinics for Remote Villages
sevaNews.titleHi: दूरदराज के गांवों के लिए 500 नई मोबाइल स्वास्थ्य क्लीनिक
sevaNews.body: Ministry of Health has launched 500 mobile health clinics targeting the most remote 10,000 villages. Each clinic carries essential medicines and diagnostic equipment.

sevaNews.title: MGNREGS Wages Increased to ₹267/day in Uttar Pradesh
sevaNews.body: The daily wage under MGNREGS has been revised upward in Uttar Pradesh from ₹220 to ₹267 per day.

sevaNews.title: National Scholarship Portal Deadline Extended to March 15
sevaNews.titleHi: राष्ट्रीय छात्रवृत्ति पोर्टल की समय सीमा 15 मार्च तक बढ़ी
sevaNews.body: The National Scholarship Portal deadline for all central scholarships has been extended to March 15, 2026.

ghostAuditAlerts.aiReasoning: Officer closed the ticket within 2 hours of assignment without attaching a resolution photo or field notes. Historical average for this category is 48 hours.
ghostAuditAlerts.impact: Stopped fraudulent closure of road repair request.

ghostAuditAlerts.aiReasoning: Sentiment analysis of citizen metadata indicates negative sentiment at closure site. GPS coordinates of officer dont match grievance location.
ghostAuditAlerts.impact: Ensuring worker presence for water supply maintenance.

ghostAuditAlerts.aiReasoning: Pattern matching reveals 5 identical closures with the same copy-pasted resolution text in 1 hour.
ghostAuditAlerts.impact: Protected ₹5.4 Lakh in sanitation contract funds.
